# Aspire Type System Capabilities
# Generated by: aspire sdk dump --format ci

# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/addAzureCosmosDB(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/addContainer(name: string, partitionKeyPaths: string|string[], containerName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBContainerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/addCosmosDatabase(name: string, databaseName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBDatabaseResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/runAsEmulator(configureContainer?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/runAsPreviewEmulator(configureContainer?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/withAccessKeyAuthentication(keyVaultBuilder?: Aspire.Hosting.Azure/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.IAzureKeyVaultResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/withDataExplorer(port?: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/withDataVolume(name?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/withDefaultAzureSku() -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.AzureCosmosDBResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/withGatewayPort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/withPartitionCount(count: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.CosmosDB/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureCosmosDBEmulatorResource
